description: vData and jQuery serialization comparison: jsdom vs browser

serialization.notes: jQuery.param in jsdom differs from manual encodeURIComponent serialization. Check encoding of special characters (+, spaces, *, !).

vData.notes: vData differs. Same length but different content. vm-slide may detect jsdom environment or depend on browser-specific APIs.

conclusion: Both jQuery serialization and vData differ. The serialization difference likely causes the vData difference (since vData is computed from the serialized body).
